layer_1_physical.note: NODE_ID not unique — fact/snapshot entities appear in multiple time periods. Expected for this data model.

layer_3_abstract_views.rel_resolved_note: 7.4T rows due to NODE_ID duplication in KG_NODE — view is technically correct but impractical for direct queries. Semantic views use typed V_* views instead.

layer_3_procedures_udfs.udf_note: UDFs execute successfully but return 0 rows — flat ontology (no subClassOf edges). Expected behavior.

known_issues: REL_RESOLVED view has 7.4T rows due to non-unique NODE_ID in KG_NODE (fact tables store multiple time periods per entity). Use typed V_* views or semantic views instead.
Graph traversal UDFs return empty results — ontology is flat with no subClassOf hierarchy. UDFs would work if class hierarchy were added later.
EdaMlContactActivityDailySnapshot node type has 0 rows in KG_NODE — source BCV view returns empty.

key_notes.central_hub: CrmAccount (CRM_ACCOUNT_ID) is the primary join key
key_notes.non_additive_metrics: RBA tables contain median FRT/TTC and ratios that cannot be summed across instances
key_notes.snapshot_pattern: EDA_ML_DATA tables use SOURCE_SNAPSHOT_DATE; _BCV views filter to latest

tabs.description: Compare source table queries vs ontology view queries side by side

tabs.description: Interactive class hierarchy tree with search/depth control + relation hierarchy tree

tabs.name: Coverage Matrix

coverage_result.note: All 23 classes have dedicated Snowflake views — 100% coverage
